compounding_status: Under active 503A bulk-substance review; final position not settled as of the review date

scheduled_event.event: Pharmacy Compounding Advisory Committee review of BPC-157

current_operational_interpretation: Do not claim that broad lawful compounding permission is finally established.
Do not assume removal from a restrictive category equals inclusion on a positive compounding list.
Recheck after the 23 July 2026 advisory meeting and any later formal FDA action.
